reasoning: The element is a large card-style UI panel with a golden pixel-art border and white interior, composited over the dark red tile area. Locatability is excellent — the bright white field and ornate gold frame make it spottable in well under 0.5s. Distinction from bg tiles is strong; the white+gold palette is completely unlike the dark teal/red tile textures. Visibility in dark areas is high due to the luminous interior. The pixel-art golden frame style is consistent with the game's overall Echoes aesthetic and matches the retro feel. However, as a 'button' it is unusually large — covering roughly 14% of the screen — and partially occludes game entities and terrain, which is unclean. The bright white card interior creates a harsh luminance jump relative to the surrounding dark environment. Additionally, its card-panel form factor diverges noticeably from the compact rounded buttons (召唤, 攻击, 压板) used elsewhere in the same HUD, creating mild style inconsistency. The element functions readably but does not feel fully native at this scale.
